description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a hip roof and a light beige exterior, complemented by green trim along the roofline and around the windows. The front facade includes a small covered entryway with an arched opening and a bay window, adding architectural interest. Multiple rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on the visible sides, providing ample natural light. The property is bordered by a low hedge and a paved driveway leading to a detached garage with a flat roof. Tall, slender trees with white foliage line one side of the lot, creating a natural privacy screen. The overall setting suggests a suburban residential environment with landscaped surroundings and a clear separation between the main house and the garage.
description: A single-story beige bungalow with a hip roof, green trim, bay window, and a detached flat-roofed garage, surrounded by trees and hedges.
description_view_0: The front and side of the bungalow are visible, showing the hip roof, bay window, arched entry, and the detached garage with trees to the right.
description_view_1: The view is dominated by tall, white-leaved trees in front of the garage and house, partially obscuring the structures behind.
description_view_2: The rear and side of the bungalow and garage are visible, highlighting the flat-roofed garage and the symmetrical window arrangement on the house.
description_view_3: The front facade is prominent, showing the arched entry, bay window, and the landscaped front yard with hedges and a walkway.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with bay window on front facade
